name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim after injury in Utah?
description: Report within 180 days in Utah; sooner preserves benefits.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim after injury in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report within 180 days in Utah; sooner preserves benefits.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: In Utah, report within 180 days to avoid disqualification, though immediate notice is best; formal Form 122 follows employer reporting.[1][2] The statute emphasizes 'as soon as practicable' for verbal/written notice.[2] Key factors: Employer/insurer files Form 122 within 21 days total; doctor submits Form 123 in 7 days; late reports shift proof burden to you.[1][2] Practical guidance: Document everything now, request claim status, and don't miss medical appointments. Legal help ensures timely processing.
